summary: Comprehensive backend (pytest, 18 tests) and frontend (Playwright) testing of Fabián Arenas CRM Phase 1. All flows verified end-to-end: auth (4 seed users + invalid), /auth/me, change-password, admin user creation + 403 for non-admins, clients CRUD (11 fields), invoice calculations (IVA 21%, 0/2/4% discount), multi-invoice history, sidebar navigation, admin-only Usuarios page. 18/18 backend tests pass; UI flows pass.

minor.issue: Returns success but path-prefix admin role is enforced - confirmed working. Note: emails are lowercased server-side (correct, but undocumented in API contract).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: set_auth_cookie uses secure=True + samesite='none' which is correct for cross-site preview env; ensure same in production.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - consider migrating to lifespan handlers (FastAPI >=0.95).
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook recommends 5-fail lockout). Not blocking for Phase 1 but recommended.
GET /api/clients returns full list with no pagination - fine for low volume, watch as data grows.
Invoice numero_factura has no uniqueness constraint; duplicates allowed (may be intentional).
test_credentials: Using credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md (all 4 seed users verified working).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed users/clients/invoices via API only; no manual DB seed required (server.py seeds 4 users on startup idempotently).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_crm_api.py reusable for regression. Frontend uses data-testid attributes consistently. Total facturado in Fidelización is computed correctly (verified 118.58 + 232.32 = 350.90). All sidebar nav items work; Usuarios visible only when role=admin.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found in Phase 1 scope.
